Comment on attachment 256600
x11-toolkits/vte3: update to 0.78.2

Where are the other fast_float commits outlined in https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/vte/-/issues/2823#note_2252762 ? One of them should obviate CPPFLAGS since the first commit(s) includes fast_float in the wrong location.
